raw_outputs.groq:
```json
{
  "preconditions": [
    "object must be an object",
    "name must be a string",
    "default must be an object or None"
  ],
  "postconditions": [
    "returns the value of a named attribute of an object",
    "returns the default value if the attribute does not exist and default is provided",
    "raises an AttributeError if the attribute does not exist and default is not provided"
  ],
  "edge_cases": [
    "name is not a string",
    "object is None",
    "default is not an object or None",
    "attribute does not exist",
    "attribute exists but is not accessible"
  ]
}
```

  ],

    "raises AttributeError if the attribute does not exist and default is not provided"
  ]
}
